allow: Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const w=c.wizard; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(w\),null,2\)\); const l=w.level_data; if\(l\) console.log\('has level_data, first entry:', JSON.stringify\(l[0],null,2\)\); else console.log\('no level_data key, keys:', Object.keys\(w\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./public/data/spells.json'\); const cantrips=Object.values\(s\).filter\(sp=>sp.level===0\).slice\(0,3\); console.log\('cantrip example:', JSON.stringify\(cantrips[0]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const eq=require\('./public/data/equipment.json'\); console.log\('categories:', Object.keys\(eq\)\); console.log\('armor sample:', JSON.stringify\(eq.armor[0]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); console.log\('Bard L1:', JSON.stringify\(c.bard.levels[0].class_specific\)\); console.log\('Bard L2:', JSON.stringify\(c.bard.levels[1].class_specific\)\); console.log\('Wizard L1:', JSON.stringify\(c.wizard.levels[0].class_specific\)\); console.log\('Sorcerer L1:', JSON.stringify\(c.sorcerer.levels[0].class_specific\)\); console.log\('Ranger L1:', JSON.stringify\(c.ranger.levels[0].class_specific\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const b=c.bard; console.log\('bard keys:', Object.keys\(b\)\); console.log\('bard L1 keys:', b.levels ? JSON.stringify\(b.levels[0]\) : 'NO LEVELS'\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const b=c.bard; console.log\('bard.levels type:', typeof b.levels, Array.isArray\(b.levels\)\); if\(b.levels\) { console.log\('first level:', JSON.stringify\(b.levels[0]\)\) } else { console.log\('levels val:', b.levels\) }")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const b=c.bard; console.log\('levels keys:', Object.keys\(b.levels\).slice\(0,5\)\); const firstKey=Object.keys\(b.levels\)[0]; console.log\('first entry:', JSON.stringify\(b.levels[firstKey]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const classes=['wizard','cleric','druid','paladin','ranger']; classes.forEach\(name => { const cls=c[name]; const l1=cls.levels['1']; console.log\(name, 'L1 cs keys:', l1 ? Object.keys\(l1.class_specific\) : 'NO LEVEL'\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const w=c.wizard; const l4=w.levels['4']; console.log\('wizard L4 features:', l4.features\); const l20=w.levels['20']; console.log\('wizard L20 features:', l20.features\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./public/data/spells.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\).slice\(0,3\); keys.forEach\(k=>console.log\('key:', k, '| slug field:', d[k].slug, '| name:', d[k].name\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); Object.entries\(d\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\(k, JSON.stringify\(v.primary_ability\), v.spellcasting?.ability ?? 'none'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const w = d['warlock']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(w\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('levels keys:', Object.keys\(w.levels || {}\)\); console.log\('level1:', JSON.stringify\(w.levels?.['1'], null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./public/data/backgrounds.json'\); const first = Object.values\(d\)[0]; console.log\('keys:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(first\)\)\); console.log\('skill_proficiencies:', JSON.stringify\(first.skill_proficiencies\)\); console.log\('tool_proficiencies:', JSON.stringify\(first.tool_proficiencies\)\); console.log\('personality_traits:', Array.isArray\(first.personality_traits\), first.personality_traits?.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const r = d['rogue']; console.log\('Rogue level 1:', JSON.stringify\(r.levels['1'], null, 2\)\); console.log\('Rogue level 6:', JSON.stringify\(r.levels['6'], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const b = d['bard']; console.log\('Bard level 3:', JSON.stringify\(b.levels['3'], null, 2\)\); console.log\('Bard level 10:', JSON.stringify\(b.levels['10'], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./data/equipment/wondrous_items.json'\); console.log\('Items:', data.length\); const names = data.map\(i=>i.name\).sort\(\); console.log\('First:', names[0]\); console.log\('Last:', names[names.length-1]\); const dupes = names.filter\(\(n,i\)=>names.indexOf\(n\)!==i\); console.log\('Dupes:', dupes.length ? dupes : 'none'\);")

Bash(node -e "const spells = require\('./public/data/spells.json'\); const bb = Object.entries\(spells\).find\(\([k,v]\) => v.name && v.name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('booming'\)\); console.log\(bb ? JSON.stringify\(bb[1], null, 2\) : 'not found'\); console.log\('total spells:', Object.keys\(spells\).length\);")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./public/data/classes.json'\); const cls = Object.values\(d\)[0]; console.log\(cls.name, JSON.stringify\(cls.starting_equipment, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./public/data/backgrounds.json'\); const bg = Object.values\(d\)[0]; console.log\(bg.name, JSON.stringify\(bg.starting_equipment, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const w = require\('./data/equipment/weapons.json'\); console.log\('Total weapons:', w.length\); const magical = w.filter\(x => x.rarity || x.magical || x.attunement\); console.log\('Magical entries:', magical.length\); if\(magical.length\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\(magical.slice\(0,3\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const w = require\('./data/equipment/wondrous_items.json'\); console.log\('Total wondrous:', w.length\); const weapons = w.filter\(x => x.weapon_type || \(x.name && /sword|axe|bow|blade|spear|dagger|mace|staff|wand|rod|flail|hammer|lance|pike|trident|whip/i.test\(x.name\)\)\); console.log\('Weapon-like entries:', weapons.length\); if\(weapons.length\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\(weapons.slice\(0,5\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=fs.readdirSync\('data/feats'\); const prereqs=new Set\(\); files.forEach\(f=>{ try{ const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/feats/'+f\)\); \(d.prerequisites||[]\).forEach\(p=>prereqs.add\(p\)\); }catch\(e\){} }\); [...prereqs].sort\(\).forEach\(p=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const f = require\('./public/data/feats.json'\); const entries = Object.entries\(f\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => JSON.stringify\(v\).toLowerCase\(\).includes\('advantage'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(entries.map\(\([k,v]\) => \({slug: k, desc: v.description?.substring\(0,300\)}\)\), null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const buf=fs.readFileSync\('dnd-icon.png'\); const view=new DataView\(buf.buffer\); const w=view.getUint32\(16\); const h=view.getUint32\(20\); console.log\(w+'x'+h\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./public/data/equipment.json'\); const w=d.weapons||[]; const bonusWeapons=w.filter\(x=>x.bonus!=null\); console.log\('Weapons with bonus:', bonusWeapons.length, bonusWeapons.map\(x=>x.name+': +'+x.bonus\)\)")

hooks.command: node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>{const c=(JSON.parse(s).tool_input.command||'');if(/\b(main|master)\b/i.test(c)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',permissionDecision:'deny',permissionDecisionReason:'Push to main/master is blocked. Push to the feature branch and open a PR.'}}))}})"
hooks.statusMessage: Checking push target is not main/master
